text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 314 

TIER_ID 

LABEL: Tier Number 

DESCRIPTION: Medicare Part D formulary tier identifier. This field represents the cost sharing tier in which the 
product was placed in the sponsor's formulary. 

This identifier is also a key that links a Part D sponsor's cost sharing tier record to a prescription drug 
event record via contract ID, plan ID, and tier ID. 

TYPE: CHAR
